summary:
Biofeedback training can help athletes manage stress-related physiologic symptoms by enhancing self-awareness of their mental-emotional state through real-time data. This regulation may improve concentration, reduce distractions from negative emotions or arousal levels during competition, thereby supporting better decision-making under pressure—key components for optimal athletic performance.

Okay, I need to summarize Agent2’s reasoning based strictly on its content without adding external information.

First sentence should capture the core idea about how biofeedback affects athlete performance through psychological-physiological links. The second must highlight specific benefits tied directly to competitive settings—the kind asked clinically.

I notice the original response already includes a strong link between regulating breath/autonomy and improving focus/emotion management which are critical in sports contexts. These elements map clearly onto enhanced cognitive function and reduced distraction during peak moments.

Final summary needs only two concise sentences focusing solely on what was reasoned—not assumptions beyond text—and using precise terms related to actual performance outcomes.
